pricing.subtitle: Formats tailored to every need — from one-off analysis to strategic advisory.
pricing.unit.name: Individual Report
pricing.unit.desc: Instant access to a complete market report
pricing.bundle.name: Sector Bundle
pricing.bundle.desc: Report package on a single sector with discount
pricing.bundle.f1: 3 to 5 reports from the same sector
pricing.custom.name: Custom
pricing.custom.desc: Tailored report based on your challenge
pricing.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
pricing.faq1.q: What format are reports delivered in?
pricing.faq1.a: All reports are delivered as high-quality PDFs, with an accompanying Excel file containing raw exportable data. The executive summary is included in every report.
pricing.faq2.a: Yes. Each report includes 12 months of free updates. When significant changes affect the studied market, we publish a new version and notify you by email.
pricing.faq3.q: Can I share a report with my team?
pricing.faq3.a: The standard license is for individual use. For multi-user access, contact us for a team or enterprise license — we'll propose a tailored rate.
pricing.faq4.q: What payment methods do you accept?
pricing.faq4.a: We accept credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, AMEX) via Stripe, as well as bank transfers for enterprise orders. Invoicing complies with French law.
methodology.title: Our Methodology
methodology.subtitle: Analytical rigor, verified sources, total transparency. Here's how we build every report.
methodology.process.title: Our 5-Step Process
methodology.step1.title: Scoping & hypotheses
methodology.step1.desc: Precise definition of scope, key questions, and market hypotheses to validate or invalidate.
methodology.step2.title: Data collection
methodology.step2.desc: Primary sources (expert interviews, surveys) and secondary sources (official records, sector publications, databases).
methodology.step3.title: Analysis & modeling
methodology.step3.desc: Data cross-referencing, market sizing, competitive mapping, identification of structural trends.
methodology.step4.title: Writing & review
methodology.step4.desc: Structured writing with actionable executive summary. Double review: editorial and factual.
methodology.step5.title: Publication & updates
methodology.step5.desc: Multi-format publication (PDF + data). Continuous monitoring and guaranteed 12-month updates.
methodology.sources.title: Our Data Sources
methodology.commitment.title: Our Quality Commitments
methodology.commitment1: Every figure is sourced and verifiable
methodology.commitment2: Methodology documented and transparent in every report
methodology.commitment4: Guaranteed update in case of major market change
methodology.commitment5: Right of correction if a factual error is identified
